registered_test: cross-market rationing: provider 429 incidence rises with same-day book impact (thinness), demand controls included — rationing as the rational alternative to paying impact at a fixed menu price; gates on 30 joint days
claim_boundary: Vast.ai book only (one venue; hyperscaler/neocloud reserved capacity unobserved); walking the book ignores multi-GPU node constraints and geographic/interconnect requirements, so impact is a LOWER bound for training-grade sourcing and an approximation for inference-grade.
